objective: Cursor adapter hardening on dev branch — research-driven hardening of model discovery, effort mapping, and transport layers after #117 fix merge.

workPhases.title: Unify effort suffix vocabulary + wire ID sanitization + consistency invariant

tasks.title: Export canonical effort suffixes from effort-map.ts, use in discovery.ts
Sanitize wire IDs in live-models.ts: trim, dedupe, reject control chars, cap count
Add catalog invariant test: supportsReasoningEffort models must have effort-map entries
Run bun test, verify zero regressions

criteria.scenario: LIVE_EFFORT_SUFFIXES derived from effort-map canonical source
criteria.capturedEvidence: discovery.ts imports CANONICAL_EFFORT_SUFFIXES from effort-map.ts; LIVE_EFFORT_SUFFIXES removed; Set-based lookup replaces array scan

criteria.scenario: Wire IDs sanitized: whitespace-only rejected, deduped, bounded
criteria.capturedEvidence: live-models.ts: trim, /[\x00-\x1f]/ reject, Set dedupe, cap 500. +14 -3 lines

criteria.expectedEvidence: test asserts every supportsReasoningEffort model has effort-map entry
criteria.capturedEvidence: cursor-static-catalog.test.ts: new test reasoning-effort models have explicit effort tiers — 2 pass 0 fail

criteria.scenario: Full test suite passes with no new failures
criteria.expectedEvidence: bun test exits with same 6 pre-existing failures only
criteria.capturedEvidence: bun test: 2395 pass 6 fail (same 6 oauth), 10069 assertions, 2401 tests across 229 files
